task_completion.description: Navigate to the shift configuration section in AttendHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application is open and the Shift management, Time/Attendance settings, or Shift list screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Open the form or dialog to add a new shift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog, window, or form specifically for creating or adding a new shift is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the shift name as 'Night Shift'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Night Shift' is typed into the Shift Name input field.

task_completion.description: Set the start time to 22:00 (10:00 PM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time input field displays '22:00' or '10:00 PM'.

task_completion.description: Set the end time to 06:00 (6:00 AM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end time input field displays '06:00' or '6:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Save the new shift and verify it is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Night Shift' appears in the main list of configured shifts, or the save button is clicked and a success confirmation is shown.

integrity.description: The agent used the AttendHRM GUI to create the shift.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the AttendHRM graphical user interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual AttendHRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window shows AttendHRM branding, menus, and UI elements, rather than a text editor or generic mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no database management tools (e.g., DBeaver, FlameRobin, or command-line SQL clients) open and being used to insert the shift directly into the Firebird database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a shift named 'Night Shift' with a start time of 22:00 (10:00 PM) and an end time of 06:00 (6:00 AM). The agent must use the AttendHRM application GUI to configure this.
